title: I need someone to help setup Monday.com for real estate agent
excerpt: Need to manage leads, listings, sales, etc…  We have partly set it up, but are struggling with how to configure and automate.

posts.author: rick360modern (Rick)
posts.cookedHtml: Need to manage leads, listings, sales, etc… We have partly set it up, but are struggling with how to configure and automate.

posts.cookedHtml:
@rick360modern sounds like you could benefit from a monday CRM onboarding! The service would get your workflow setup, training on monday CRM, and guidance through building and automating your sales process.

You can learn more about that package here: https://www.services.carbonweb.co/packages/monday-crm-onboarding/

posts.author: Racingleys (Alek)
posts.cookedHtml: I set up something similar for my real estate tasks by creating boards for listings, clients, and showings, then linking them to track what stage each deal is in. For example, I based my structure on how I manage my rentals with Cupertino Property Management -Valley Managment Group —they keep things super organized with timelines and contacts. Monday’s automations helped keep everything moving, especially for follow-ups and scheduling.
